_comments.keywords: Job title/description must match at least one. Case-insensitive.
_comments.priority_companies: Always alert regardless of keyword match.
_comments.blocklist_companies: Never alert. Partial name match, case-insensitive.
_comments.remote_only: If true, skip any job without a remote flag.
_comments.max_hours_old: Skip jobs older than this many hours.
_comments.results_per_source: Max results fetched per source per run (keep ≤25).
